description: <onIdle> to= not a variant of the engine's for= enum (§51.0.R). Phase = { Active, Idle }; the watchdog targets .Sleeping, which is not a Phase variant. The to= target MUST be a variant of the for= enum (strict-by-default), so E-IDLE-INVALID-VARIANT fires (the §34 error partition).
rationale: §51.0.R the <onIdle> to= target MUST be a variant of the engine's for= enum; .Sleeping is not a Phase variant -> E-IDLE-INVALID-VARIANT.
